value: Chrome blocks file:// → file:// image loads (CORS: Cross origin requests only supported for http/https). Relative paths, absolute paths, and file:/// URIs all fail when loading images in local HTML files opened via file:// protocol. The ONLY reliable method is base64-encoding the PNG into the HTML as a data:image/png;base64,... data URI. This applies to all local HTML reports that embed images (tweet-it cards, trade specs, etc). Typical card PNG is ~100KB base64.
